name: Feature request

assignees: ''

## What's missing

A clear description of the gap. What can a reader or AI agent not do today that they should be able to do?

## Proposed addition

- Type: [ ] doc / [ ] prompt / [ ] playbook / [ ] diagram / [ ] workflow / [ ] other
- Suggested location: `docs/...` or `assets/...` or `.github/workflows/...`
- Working title or filename:

## Why it belongs in FLOW

Tie this to one or more FLOW stages (Find / Leverage / Optimize / Win / Local) or to a foundational concept. If it doesn't map, explain why it's still in scope.

## Source basis

Per the evidence standard, every new doc or claim needs cited 2026 sources.

- Primary sources you'd build this from:
- Cited statistics already in the bibliography that would carry over:
- Independent sources you'd add (publisher, title, URL, year):

## Independence rule

This repository does **not** accept content that is recognizably derivative of *Ski Slope Strategy 3.0* by Chris Von Wilpert (Content Mavericks). New material must be re-derived from independent 2025–2026 sources.

- [ ] My proposal is not a paraphrase of Ski Slope tactical recipes
- [ ] My proposal does not reference the 17 legacy case-study examples (see `docs/10-references/independence-ledger.md`)
- [ ] My proposal cites at least one independent 2026 or 2025 source
